nodes.label: Team Management API router. Allows landlords to invite team members, manage perm
Get all team members for the current landlord or the team the user belongs to.
Get all pending team invites for the current user.
Invite a new team member by email.
Get details of a specific team member.
Update team member's name or permission level.
Update which properties a team member can access.
Accept a team invite. User must be logged in.
Get info about an invite (public endpoint for invite page).
